allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./recipes.json''\); const non4 = d.recipes.filter\(r => r.servings !== 4\); console.log\(''Recept som INTE är 4 portioner:'', non4.length\); non4.forEach\(r => console.log\(''  ID'', r.id, r.title, r.servings, ''portioner''\)\); console.log\(''Totalt recept:'', d.recipes.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''recipes.json'',''utf-8''\)\); const non4 = d.recipes.filter\(r => r.servings !== 4\); console.log\(''Non-4:'', non4.length\); non4.forEach\(r => console.log\(r.id, r.title, r.servings\)\); console.log\(''Total:'', d.recipes.length\);")
